summary: Frontend-only refactor verification for JawCom. Verified sidebar order & test IDs, all 3 redirects (/customersâ†’/contacts, /companiesâ†’/contacts, /reportsâ†’/), merged Dashboard sections, Contacts table columns + 7-tab drawer, Journey Monitor table (all 15 headers, tabs, search, 6 FilterSelects, row-click drawer), Inbox context panel (JAWIS + Journey + controls + auto-sent badges), and 0 console errors across 16 routes. All items from the review request pass.

issues: Tab labels are truncated with a trailing period (e.g. 'Over.', 'Conv.', 'Auto.', 'Time.', 'Comp.'). Underlying tab values (overview/conversation/automation/timeline/notes/ai/company) are correct, but the visible labels look truncated/awkward. Consider widening the drawer/tabs or using shorter but complete labels (Overview, Convo, Auto, Timeline, Notes, AI, Company).

action_items: Optional (design polish only): Fix truncated tab labels in Contacts drawer ('Over.', 'Conv.', 'Auto.', 'Time.', 'Comp.') â€” either widen the drawer/TabsList or use full short words.
critical_code_review_comments: No stale references to deleted pages (Reports.jsx, Customers.jsx, Companies.jsx, Journeys.jsx) â€” verified via grep across /app/frontend/src.
Route order in App.js is correct; the wildcard '*' â†’ Navigate to '/' will not shadow the explicit redirect routes.
NAV_ITEMS matches the required 13-item order exactly with correct test IDs.
seed_data_creation: None. All dummy data comes from /app/frontend/src/dummy-data/*.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor verified end-to-end. Key data-testids used: page-dashboard, page-contacts, page-journey-monitor, contacts-table, contacts-search, contacts-filter, journey-monitor-table, journey-monitor-search, journey-monitor-tabs, context-panel, jawis-section, journey-section, journey-controls, journey-pause, journey-override, journey-ai-toggle, auto-sent-<msgId>, nav-*.
